basic_info.name: Lin Xiao
basic_info.education: Bachelor's Degree (China Academy of Art, Visual Communication Design)
basic_info.housing_status: Renting (Near Future Sci-Tech City, Yuhang District; one-bedroom apartment, pet-friendly)

pet_background.adoption_story: In the winter of 2021, while walking home from overtime work, Lin Xiao found a kitten abandoned in a cardboard box next to a trash bin downstairs from her office. Shivering from cold and hunger, she immediately took the kitten home to warmth. The next day, she brought it to a veterinary clinic for a check-up and subsequently decided to adopt it.
pet_background.personality: Outwardly aloof and haughty, but actually extremely clingy. Wary of strangers, yet possesses a strong sense of possessiveness towards Lin Xiao. Likes to lie on the keyboard to 'supervise' work and instantly wakes from deep sleep at the sound of a can opening.
pet_background.health_history: Suffered from severe ringworm and ear mites during the initial adoption period; fully recovered after two months of medication. In 2023, experienced a mild intestinal obstruction after accidentally ingesting a plastic string, recovering via induced vomiting and IV fluids. Since then, all small items in the home are strictly stored away.

family_relations.name: Mrs. Lin
family_relations.relationship_to_pet: Initially strongly opposed to having a cat due to concerns about hygiene and allergies. Her attitude softened after seeing videos of 'Mochi' sent by Lin Xiao. Now, she always asks about the cat during every video call and occasionally mails homemade dried chicken treats.

family_relations.name: Mr. Lin
family_relations.relationship_to_pet: A man of few words, but silently supportive. He once secretly transferred money to Lin Xiao with the note 'for the cat's heating,' though he doesn't really know how to interact with cats and only dares to watch them through the screen during video calls.

social_circle.name: Chen Chen
social_circle.connection: Also a 'poop scooper' (owns a Golden Retriever). They often exchange pet photos during lunch breaks at work and meet up on weekends to visit pet-friendly parks in Hangzhou, recommending reliable pet products to each other.

social_circle.name: Dr. Zhang
social_circle.connection: More than just a doctor-patient relationship; they are like friends. Lin Xiao trusts his professional advice implicitly, and he handles all of Mochi's check-ups and vaccinations. Dr. Zhang also frequently comments on Lin Xiao's daily cat-raising posts on social media.

daily_habits.activity: Woken up by Mochi stepping on her; cleans the litter box, refills the automatic feeder with dry food, and replaces the fresh drinking water.
After returning from work, plays with Mochi using a wand toy for 20 minutes to burn off energy, then feeds a meal of wet food while brushing to remove loose fur.
Performs a deep vacuuming of the entire house (targeting cat hair), washes the cat bed and blankets, checks nail length, and trims them.

emotional_mapping.behavior: Upon returning home, she remains silent, directly picks up Mochi, and curls up on the sofa. Feeling the cat's purring and body warmth usually calms her emotions significantly within 10 minutes.
Mochi voluntarily jumps onto the desk, lying beside the monitor or keyboard, and rubs its head against Lin Xiao's hand as if offering silent companionship, making her feel she is not fighting alone.

life_milestones.description: When moving houses in 2022, priority was given to 'pet-friendly' policies and 'enclosed balconies.' To prevent Mochi from experiencing stress, Lin Xiao took two days off to accompany the cat throughout the process and used pheromone sprays to aid adaptation to the new environment.

On the night of Mochi's emergency visit in 2023 due to foreign object ingestion, Lin Xiao profoundly realized for the first time that pets are family members, not toys. This experience prompted her to start learning pet first aid knowledge and purchase pet health insurance.

preferences.food_brand: Prefers 'Orijen' and 'Acana' for main meals; favors 'Leonardo' canned food and the emerging domestic brand 'Pat' freeze-dried raw meat for treats.
preferences.vet: 'An'an Pet Hospital' near Zhuantang, Hangzhou (close to home, well-equipped, and the doctors are patient).
preferences.toys: Favorites include corrugated cardboard scratchers and electric fishing rod toys with feathers; shows little interest in expensive electric mouse toys.
preferences.grooming: Bathes at home every two weeks (using imported shampoo), visits a pet grooming salon quarterly for professional degreasing and nail filing; brushes daily without fail.
